versions.summary: Initial complete 15-day UK itinerary with provisional places and planning data.
Phase 5 travel platform data model with reusable module placeholders.
Phase 6 compatibility bridge for cached app shells; migrates forward in current clients.
Phase 6 integration architecture with provider adapters, CMS boundary and price history model.
Phase 4 dashboard visibility update with explicit trip route and planning status data.
Hotel selection workspace with per-location options, scoring and comparison data.
